remember: Students will be able to explain the concept of environmental pollution.
Students will be able to list different types of pollutants and their effects.
Students will be able to recall the major sources of pollution.
understand: Students will be able to explain the causes and effects of pollution on human health and environment.
Students will be able to describe the role of the individual in maintaining a clean environment.
Students will be able to understand the importance of sustainable development and conservation of natural resources.
apply: Students will be able to suggest measures to prevent or minimize pollution.
Students will be able to propose ways to conserve natural resources and reduce waste.
Students will be able to design a plan for maintaining a clean and healthy environment.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the impact of human activities on the environment and suggest ways to mitigate it.
Students will be able to evaluate the effectiveness of different strategies for environmental conservation.
Students will be able to compare and contrast different methods of waste management.

ncert_objectives: Explain the concept of environmental pollution and its effects on human health and the environment.
Describe the major sources of pollution and their effects on the environment.
Discuss the role of the individual in maintaining a clean environment and conserving natural resources.
board_exam_objectives: Students will be able to explain the causes and effects of pollution.
Students will be able to describe the measures to prevent or minimize pollution.
Students will be able to explain the importance of sustainable development and conservation of natural resources.
